name: Kestrel
description: The Kestrel boomerang is a heavy throwing weapon that can knock down enemies at a distance.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Kestrel boomerang is a heavy throwing weapon that can knock down enemies at a distance.

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kestrel’s boomerang sound not stopping if using a Warframe ability during melee attacks.

patchlogs.name: The War Within: 19.0.7 - Valkyr Prime
patchlogs.changes: Increased projectile damage of Halikar and Kestrel in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview
patchlogs.changes: Removed auto-targeting of Halikar and Kestrel in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.10.5
patchlogs.changes: •    Reduced the Halikar’s auto-targeting mechanic to mimic other thrown type (Glaive, Kestrel, etc.) melee weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.5: Tubemen Of Regor
patchlogs.changes: The following weapons are now available for use in Conclave:  Dera, Dera Vandal, Boltor, Boltor Prime, Tonfa, Heat Sword, Dual Heat Swords, Glaive, Glaive Prime, Kestrel, Fragor, Wraith Karak.

patchlogs.name: Warframe: Archwing
patchlogs.changes: Kestrel: Entropy Flight: adds 35% flight speed

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with thrown melee weapons (Glaive Prime/Kestrel) losing weapon functionality if they perform a ground slam attack when they are already close to the ground while in melee mode.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Improved the positioning of melee accessories on Boomerang weapons (Kestrel).

patchlogs.name: Update 13.1.0: Amprex
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with cosmetic weapon dangles not being properly attached to the Kestrel.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Fixed issue with Kestrel and Glaive animations for holstering

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fix for Glaive mods to be shared between Glaive/Kestrel

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Glaive and Kestrels charged attacks so that they take into account any power stored in the weapon from mods such as Melee Channel.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.1.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Infested bosses disappearing after being damaged by Kestrel
